programme.title: In short
programme.desc: The year 2019, on the threshold of the pandemic.Single woman Ellen (Laura Tonke) spends New Year's Eve with her friends.No one knows that she is having an affair with Sebastian (Ronald Zehrfeld), Eva's (Antje Traue) husband.Rolf (Nicholas Ofczarek) and Dina (Pegah Ferydoni) make a perfect couple, unlike Mareike (Annette Frier) and Adam (Trystan Pütter).Maya (Katia Fellin) wants children, Natalie (Jasmin Shakeri) cannot decide.Max (Henning Flüsloh) comes into Ellen's life and he would love her if she let him.Years pass.The woman attends various types of celebrations, birthday parties and casual social gatherings.He learns about events in his friends' lives.The sense of community unites and allows everyone to return to everyday life with positive energy.Remake of the Danish film "A Long Story Briefly".

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programme.desc: Sarah (Margot Robbie) and David (Colin Farrell) meet at a friend's wedding.They go on an expedition during which they relive the most important moments from their past.

credits.actor: Father of the Bride - Mike Meldman

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Doug (Jack Black) and Griff (Paul Rudd) have been friends since childhood.They have always dreamed of making a remake of their favorite film, the horror film "Anaconda".When both buddies experience a midlife crisis, they decide not to wait any longer and set off together deep into the Amazon to start filming.The situation becomes more complicated when... a real giant anaconda appears on the film set, spreading chaos and destruction around.Despite the deadly threat, the friends decide to take advantage of the predator's presence.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Peacemaker 2
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programme.title: Your Monster
programme.desc: Actress Laura (Melissa Barrera) was supposed to become a star of the stage and live happily with the director of the show, Jacob (Edmund Donovan), but her beloved dumped her and took the role away.The devastated woman returns to her family home, where she spends all day in a bathrobe and crying.Her wailing gets on the nerves of the monster (Tommy Dewey), who has been living in the closet for years.The monster gives Laura two weeks to move out and threatens bloody revenge.Over time, however, an extraordinary bond develops between them, which helps Laura open her heart and follow her dreams.

programme.title: This is the end
programme.desc: A series of paranormal events take place in Los Angeles, reminiscent of the end of the world.As a result of the chaos in the city, a group of friends are trapped in an apartment.Unfortunately, their situation is becoming more and more dramatic by the minute: they are running out of food and free space, which gives rise to conflicts.Finally, having no other choice, they decide to leave the apartment and face the chaos outside.The wacky comedy is the directorial debut of two comedians: Seth Rogen and Evan Goldberg.In addition to brilliant humor, the film is full of fierce irony directed at American celebrities.The main roles were played by: James Franco ("Citizen Milk", "127 Hours"), Jonah Hill ("Moneyball", "The Wolf of Wall Street"), Danny McBride ("Divine Chillout", the series "It Could Be Worse"), Emma Watson ("Harry Potter") and singer Rihanna.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: Recidivist Callum Lynch sentenced to death is not executed.After a fake execution, he ends up in a secret laboratory.There he meets Rikkin and his daughter Sofia.Scientists have a mysterious device that allows them to access the records of ancestors' actions stored in their genes.The criminal is to connect with the consciousness of Aguilar from Spain, who lived during the Great Inquisition and obtained the Apple of Eden, which provides control over emotions.By using this item, you can supposedly eliminate aggression in people.The daredevil travels to the Middle Ages.He discovers that he is a descendant of a member of the Assassin secret society.Over time, he learns what a big mistake he made when he trusted Sofia and her father.

programme.title: Cabin Pressure - 'Anya leszek csak azért is!'
programme.desc: Heni decides to get pregnant by a much older homosexual, give birth to a child and raise it together with the man.Many challenges await them, including:from cultural differences.

programme.title: Frieda's Case
programme.desc: The year 1904. A seamstress accused of a crime becomes the center of a trial that exposes the injustices of the legal system.

programme.title: A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Lloyd Vogel (Matthew Rhys) is in crisis.His marriage to Andrea (Susan Kelechi Watson) is not going well.His son was recently born and he can't quite cope with the role of a parent.His wife, in turn, completely lost patience with his moods.He is also stressed by his relationship with his father, Jerry (Chris Cooper).She cannot forgive him for abandoning his family in the past and leaving him alone with his sick mother.Things aren't going well at work either.An aspiring investigative journalist is given a task by his superior that is below his skills.He is to prepare a short article as part of a series about inspiring people.He comes to interview the nationally beloved children's show host, Fred Rogers (Tom Hanks).Without any enthusiasm, he meets America's favorite, who immediately surprises him with his cheerfulness.Suddenly, the roles in their relationship are reversed.While it was Lloyd who was supposed to question Rogers, it was Rogers who steered the conversation and got him to confess.A friendship develops between the men.Under the influence of meetings with Fred, Vogel rediscovers the joy of life and begins to believe that he can repair relationships with his loved ones and experience happiness.A film inspired by a true story.

programme.title: The Glassworker
programme.desc: Vincent Oliver, the son of renowned glassmaker Tomasz, is preparing for his first exhibition when he finds a letter from his childhood friend, Alliz Amano, whom he has always loved.He recalls how - raised by a pacifist father - he saw her for the first time.Alliz arrives in Vincent's city, Waterfront, with her parent, Colonel Amano.They become a couple.Meanwhile, a war breaks out and both he and his rival for the girl's favor, Malik, join the army.Tomasz is forced to produce glass rectifiers for the army.Some time later, the girl's father dies without any news at the front.When Malik returns to town with him, Alliz rewards him with a kiss, which Vincent witnesses.Devastated, he sabotages the production of rectifiers, but this leads to tragedy.The anime-inspired production with an anti-war message is the first Pakistani film made using the hand-animated technique.

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle
programme.desc: British ski jumper Michael 'Eddie' Edwards, although not successful, believes in his abilities.Thanks to the help of a charismatic coach, in 1988 he took part in the Olympics in Calgary.

credits.actor: Richmond the BOA Official - Mark Benton

programme.title: Tripped Up
programme.desc: Lizzy (Leah Lewis) has always dreamed of becoming a chef.However, participating in a culinary reality show and later working in a New York restaurant became a source of frustration for her.A cooking enthusiast is one step away from giving up her greatest passion.The last chance to stay in the catering industry is to participate in a culinary festival.Together with her friends, Mary (Ashley Moore), Kai (Ariel Winter) and Taylor (Sasha Fox), she sets off on an adventure.If she fails, she is ready to look for another path in life.Unfortunately, the team has been plagued by bad luck since the beginning of the expedition.

programme.title: Your Monster
programme.desc: Actress Laura (Melissa Barrera) was supposed to become a star of the stage and live happily with the director of the show, Jacob (Edmund Donovan), but her beloved dumped her and took the role away.The devastated woman returns to her family home, where she spends all day in a bathrobe and crying.Her wailing gets on the nerves of the monster (Tommy Dewey), who has been living in the closet for years.The monster gives Laura two weeks to move out and threatens bloody revenge.Over time, however, an extraordinary bond develops between them, which helps Laura open her heart and follow her dreams.

programme.title: Verano en diciembre
programme.desc: Four generations of women meet in Madrid at a convention organized by Teresa.She is accompanied by four daughters in their thirties, a granddaughter and her 95-year-old mother-in-law, who suffers from dementia.

programme.title: Ainda Estou Aqui
programme.desc: Brazil, 1971. A military dictatorship is gaining strength in the country, and the lives of citizens are disrupted by detentions, disappearances and acts of violence.In these dangerous times, the Paiva family tries to live a peaceful life in Rio de Janeiro.Everything changes when one day the family patriarch, Rubens (Selton Mello), a former congressman, is summoned for a mysterious interrogation by military investigators.Soon, the officers arrest Eunice Paiva (Fernanda Torres), the mother of the family.She is kept in prison for 12 days and put under pressure to hand over her friends and associates accused of opposition activities.The traumatic experience becomes the beginning of Eunice's profound transformation.After leaving prison, she is forced to find herself again - she fights for the truth as an activist.Its goal is to expose the government's illegal actions and fight for justice for thousands of victims of the regime.

programme.title: Sarah Bernhardt, la divine
programme.desc: The beginning of the 20th century.The outstanding French actress Sarah Bernhardt (Sandrine Kiberlain) is considered one of the most important artists of her time and has the status of an international star.Her admirers include Oscar Wilde, Alfons Mucha and Victor Hugo.Her talent and extraordinary charisma, as well as her courage and extravagant lifestyle are widely admired.The actress disrupted social norms and shocked her contemporaries with her unusual preferences and numerous love affairs.She was a declared opponent of anti-Semitism.Fate connected her most closely with the actor Lucien Guitry (Laurent Lafitte) and the painter Louise Abbéma (Amira Casar).Since her unlucky fall on stage in 1905 in Rio de Janeiro, Divine Sarah has been struggling with terrible knee pain, which over the years has made it impossible for her to move.In order to be able to perform, after a decade, the actress makes a dramatic decision.Full of passion and inner strength, the artist will forever be remembered in the history of art and culture.
